commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor-provided real behavior proof and maintainer review after fixing the bot-login and regex findings; ClawSweeper should not auto-repair while the proof gate remains unsatisfied.; Needs attention: The diff introduces CodeQL-flagged polynomial regexes over untrusted GitHub comment bodies.; Review finding: [P1] Add the real ClawSweeper bot logins — src/clawsweeper.ts:2584 - [P2] Replace the comment-body... (sha=58e52c7132f45e82e2a36256198171b697fef2c2)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds review-context filtering for ClawSweeper self-noise and command-only comments, extracts compact previous-review state, surfaces filtered counts, and adds unit coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking PR regression from source: the provided GitHub context shows ClawSweeper comments come from `clawsweeper[bot]`, while the new allow-list contains only `clawsweeper`. I did not run tests because this review must keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-provided real behavior proof and maintainer review after fixing the bot-login and regex findings; ClawSweeper should not auto-repair while the proof gate remains unsatisfied.

target.title: Filter noisy PR ingestion comments
target.body:
## Summary
- filter ClawSweeper self-noise and exact command-only comments out of review context
- extract the latest ClawSweeper durable review as compact previous-review state
- pass filtered comments into related-item discovery and expose filtered counts in context telemetry

## Validation
- node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.json
- node --test test/clawsweeper.test.ts
- node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/clawsweeper.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts
target.author: takhoffman

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
